source_note: Snapshot of public NICE guideline metadata. Titles and IDs are public; for the authoritative full guidance always consult nice.org.uk.

guidelines.title: Type 2 diabetes in adults: management
guidelines.summary: Covers care of adults (aged 18+) with type 2 diabetes, including individualised HbA1c targets, drug treatment pathway (metformin → SGLT2i / GLP-1 / DPP-4 / sulfonylurea), structured education, foot care, and review of complications.

guidelines.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
guidelines.summary: Specialist multidisciplinary assessment, NT-proBNP testing thresholds, first-line ACE inhibitor + beta-blocker, addition of MRA for HFrEF, escalation to SGLT2 inhibitors per 2023 update, and palliative-care planning.

guidelines.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
guidelines.summary: ABPM/HBPM confirmation, staged thresholds (stage 1/2/severe), step-up pharmacological pathway (ACE-i/ARB → CCB → thiazide-like diuretic → spironolactone), and combined CVD risk assessment.

guidelines.title: Acute kidney injury: prevention, detection and management
guidelines.summary: Risk stratification, e-alerts for AKI stage 1+, fluid resuscitation and renal-replacement triggers, drug-dose adjustments, and discharge follow-up to detect missed CKD progression.

guidelines.title: Stroke and transient ischaemic attack in over 16s
guidelines.summary: Hyper-acute imaging and thrombolysis pathway, thrombectomy eligibility windows, secondary prevention (antiplatelets, statins, BP control), and post-stroke rehabilitation referrals.

guidelines.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral
guidelines.summary: Two-week-wait referral criteria across cancer sites, safety-netting for ambiguous symptoms, and primary-care direct-access investigations.

guidelines.title: Quality standard: depression in adults
guidelines.summary: Stepped-care model, PHQ-9 monitoring, IAPT routing, and combined CBT-plus-antidepressant for moderate-to-severe depression.

guidelines.title: COVID-19 rapid guideline: managing COVID-19
guidelines.summary: Risk stratification for antiviral/monoclonal therapy, hospital oxygen targets, post-COVID syndrome assessment, and long-COVID referral pathways.
